errors.INVALID_TEAM_NAME_MIN: Team name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.INVALID_COLOR: {label} must be a hex color like #1a472a.
errors.LEAGUE_LOCKED_TEAMS_ADD: Teams cannot be added to a league in its current status.
errors.LEAGUE_LOCKED_TEAMS_REMOVE: Teams cannot be removed from a league in its current status.
errors.LEAGUE_LOCKED_TEAMS_EDIT: Teams cannot be edited in a league with its current status.
errors.LEAGUE_LOCKED_FIXTURE: Cannot change fixtures for a completed or archived league.
errors.FIXTURE_EXISTS_TEAMS_ADD: Fixture has already been generated. Use `/league reset` first, then add teams.
errors.FIXTURE_EXISTS_TEAMS_REMOVE: Fixture has already been generated. Use `/league reset` first, then remove teams.
errors.FIXTURE_EXISTS_ALREADY: A fixture already exists. Use `/league fixture regenerate` to rebuild (only if no results entered).
errors.FIXTURE_EXISTS_MATCHES: Matches already exist for this league.
errors.TEAM_LIMIT_MAX: This league already has the maximum of {max} teams.
errors.TEAM_LIMIT_FIXTURE_GENERATE: Cannot generate fixtures: team count ({count}) exceeds league maximum ({max}).
errors.TEAM_LIMIT_FIXTURE_REGENERATE: Cannot regenerate fixtures: team count ({count}) exceeds league maximum ({max}).
errors.TEAM_EXISTS_NAMED: A team named **{name}** already exists in this league.
errors.TEAM_EXISTS_OTHER: Another team with that name already exists in this league.
errors.TEAM_NOT_FOUND_NAME: No active team named **{name}** was found in this league.
errors.TEAM_NOT_FOUND_HOME: Home team **{name}** not found in this league.
errors.TEAM_NOT_FOUND_AWAY: Away team **{name}** not found in this league.
errors.NO_CHANGES: No changes were provided to update the team.
errors.FIXTURE_LOCKED: Cannot regenerate fixtures while matches are live, completed, or walkovers exist.
errors.FIXTURE_FAILED: Could not generate fixtures for this league.
errors.NOT_ENOUGH_TEAMS: At least {min} teams are required. Currently: {count}.
errors.NO_FIXTURE_GENERATE: No fixture exists yet. Use `/league fixture generate` first.
errors.NO_FIXTURE_VIEW: No fixture has been generated for this league yet. Use `/league fixture generate` first.
errors.SETTINGS_LOCKED: Cannot change scoring rules after match results have been entered.
errors.INVALID_POINTS_LABEL: {label} must be an integer between 0 and 20.
errors.INVALID_POINTS_EMPTY: Provide at least one of win, draw, or loss points to update.
errors.INVALID_USER_OWNER: The league owner is already fully privileged.
errors.PERMISSION_DENIED_MANAGE: You must be the league owner or an admin to perform this action.
errors.PERMISSION_DENIED_SCORE: You are not allowed to report scores for this league.
errors.PERMISSION_DENIED_ADMIN: Only the league owner can manage admins.
errors.INVALID_SLUG_EMPTY: You must provide a valid league slug.
errors.INVALID_SLUG_GENERATE: Could not generate a valid slug from that name.
errors.LEAGUE_NOT_FOUND: No league found with slug `{slug}` in this server.
errors.INVALID_NAME_MIN: League name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.LEAGUE_LIMIT: This server already has the maximum of {max} active leagues.
errors.SLUG_EXISTS: A league with slug `{slug}` already exists in this server.
errors.INVALID_FORMAT: Invalid league format. Use single or double round-robin.
errors.ADMIN_WIPE_CONFIRM_REQUIRED: Set `confirm` to **true** to wipe all league data in this server.
errors.CONCURRENT_UPDATE: Match was updated by someone else. Please try again.
errors.STANDINGS_FAILED: Result was saved but standings could not be updated. Run `/league rollback standings` to recover.
errors.NO_FIXTURE_SCORE: Generate the fixture before entering scores.
errors.NO_FIXTURE_SCORE_CORRECT: Generate the fixture before correcting scores.
errors.NO_FIXTURE_FORFEIT: Generate the fixture before recording a forfeit.
errors.NO_FIXTURE_ROLLBACK: No fixture exists for this league yet.
errors.MATCH_NOT_FOUND_SCHEDULED: No scheduled match found for **{home}** vs **{away}**{roundHint}.
errors.MATCH_NOT_FOUND_COMPLETED: No completed match found for **{home}** vs **{away}**{roundHint}.
errors.MATCH_ALREADY_PROCESSED: This match already has a result. Use `/league score-correct` to fix it (admin only).
errors.MATCH_NOT_CORRECTABLE: Only completed or walkover matches can be corrected.
errors.HOME_AWAY_MISMATCH: Home/away teams do not match the scheduled fixture.
errors.INVALID_SCORE: {label} must be an integer between 0 and 99.
errors.INVALID_TEAMS_BOTH: You must provide both home and away team names.
errors.INVALID_TEAMS_SAME: Home and away teams must be different.
errors.INVALID_FORFEIT_WINNER: You must specify the winning team.
errors.INVALID_FORFEIT_TEAMS: Forfeit winner must be one of the match teams.
errors.TEAM_MISMATCH: The provided teams do not match this fixture.
errors.TEAM_MISMATCH_FORFEIT: The forfeit winner does not match this fixture.
errors.AMBIGUOUS_MATCH_ROUND: Multiple matches found in round **{round}** for these teams. Contact a league admin.
errors.AMBIGUOUS_MATCH_ROUNDS: Multiple {actionLabel}s found for these teams (rounds: {rounds}). Specify the `round` option.
errors.INVALID_LOGO_URL_FORMAT: Logo URL must be a valid HTTPS URL.
errors.INVALID_LOGO_URL_HOSTNAME: Logo URL must include a public hostname.
errors.INVALID_LOGO_URL_PRIVATE: Logo URL must point to a public host (private networks are blocked).
errors.OPERATION_LOCKED: Another league operation is in progress. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.MATCH_STATUS_NOT_ALLOWED: This match status change is not supported.
errors.CL_NOT_ENABLED: Champions League is not enabled for this league.
errors.CL_ALREADY_ACTIVE: Cannot change settings while a Champions League tournament is active.
errors.CL_LEAGUE_NOT_COMPLETED: The league season must finish before Champions League starts.
errors.CL_INSUFFICIENT_TEAMS: Not enough teams qualified for Champions League (minimum 2).
errors.CL_TIE_UNRESOLVED: This knockout tie is not fully resolved yet.
errors.CL_INVALID_SPOTS: Qualifying spots must be between 2 and 16.
errors.CL_NO_GROUP_STAGE: This tournament has no group stage.
errors.GENERIC_LEAGUE_ERROR: Something went wrong while processing the league command.

create.permissionDenied: You need **Manage Server** permission to create a league.
create.nextStep: Use `/league team add league:{slug}` to add teams.

generate.nextStep: Use `/league fixture show league:{slug}` — browse weeks with the buttons below the card.

show.navHint: Use the buttons below to switch weeks.

scoreEntry.noPermission: You don't have permission to report scores in this league.
scoreEntry.noMatches: No matches found for round **{round}** in `{slug}`.
scoreEntry.selectEmpty: No pending matches on this page
scoreEntry.selectNoPending: All matches on this page are scored

standings.noFixture: No fixture generated yet for this league.

reset.stats: Removed **{matches}** matches · **{teams}** teams kept · Status: `{status}` · Season: **{season}**
reset.nextStep: Add or remove teams if needed, then run `/league fixture generate league:{slug}`.

settings.title: Champions League settings
settings.enabled: Champions League is enabled for top teams when the season ends.
settings.enabledSuccess: Champions League enabled. It will start automatically when the league season completes.

champions.awaitingSeasonEnd: Starts automatically when the league season ends.
champions.notEnabledHint: Enable Champions League in Settings to qualify top teams after the season.

standings.subtitle: Season {season} · Standings
standings.empty: No standings yet. Enter results with /league score.

fixture.subtitle: Round {round} of {totalRounds}
fixture.empty: No matches scheduled for this round.

standings.empty: No standings calculated yet. Enter match results with `/league score`.
standings.header: #  Team           O  G  B  M  A  Y  AV  P

bot.NOT_BOT_OWNER: You do not have the permission to run this command because you're not the owner of me!
bot.NOT_BOT_DEVELOPER: You do not have the permission to run this command because you're not a developer of me!
bot.NOT_GUILD_OWNER: You do not have the permission to run this command because you're not the guild owner!
bot.CHANNEL_NOT_NSFW: You cannot run this command in a non-NSFW channel!
bot.MISSING_PERMISSIONS: You do not have the permission to run this command, missing permissions.
bot.COMPONENT_NOT_PUBLIC: You are not the author of this button!
bot.GUILD_COOLDOWN: You are currently in cooldown, you have the ability to re-use this command again in `{cooldown}s`.
bot.RENDER_RATE_LIMIT: Too many render actions — try again in `{cooldown}s`.

welcome.title: Golazo joined your server
welcome.description: Run football leagues on Discord — fixtures, scores, and standings in one place.
welcome.flowValue:
1. `/league create` — set up your league
2. `/league team add` — register teams
3. `/league fixture generate` — build the schedule
welcome.helpValue: Run `/help` for the full interactive guide — 6-step league flow, commands, and tips.
welcome.footer: Start with `/help` to explore all topics

language.description: Set your preferred language for Golazo bot messages.
language.guildReset: Server language override cleared. Members will use their personal or Discord client language.
language.serverPermission: You need **Manage Server** to change the server default language.

setprefix.description: Set the Golazo prefix for this guild.
setprefix.optionPrefix: The new prefix (max 5 characters). Omit to reset to default.
setprefix.reset: Prefix reset to the default `{prefix}` for this guild.
setprefix.updated: Successfully updated the Golazo prefix for this guild to `{prefix}`.

ping.description: Golazo ping — replies with websocket latency.

help.description: Interactive guide to Golazo and the league system.
help.messageDescription: Interactive guide to Golazo and the league system.

dashboard.description: Interactive league management dashboard for this server.

league.guildOnly: This command can only be used in a server.

seed.description: Create a fake league with demo teams (max 20).
seed.success:
Fake league **`{slug}`** created with **{teamCount}** teams.{fixtureLine}
View: `/league fixture show league:{slug}`

wipe.description: Delete all leagues, teams, matches, and standings in this server.
wipe.optionConfirm: Must be true to confirm deletion.
wipe.success: Wiped league data for this server: **{leagues}** leagues, **{teams}** teams, **{matches}** matches, **{standings}** standings, **{audits}** audit entries.

eval.missingCode: You must provide the code in order to execute it!

help.stepBarIdle: League flow · pick a step below

overview.title: Quick start
overview.description: Run a full league in 6 commands — or use `/dashboard` for the interactive panel. Pick a step from the menu below.
overview.field1Value:
`/league create`
`/league team add`
`/league fixture generate`
`/league fixture show`
`/league score`
`/league standings`
`/league settings channel` (announcements)
overview.field2Value:
Admin creates the league.
Owner runs day-to-day tasks.
Scorer enters match results.
overview.field3Value:
`/language set` for you
`/language server set` for this server
overview.footer: Use the menu below to switch topics

league_step_1.title: Create league
league_step_1.field2Value: Add teams and save the league **slug**.

league_step_2.title: Add teams
league_step_2.description: `/league team add league: slug name: FC Eagles`
league_step_2.field2Value: Add all teams before generating the fixture. Minimum 2 teams.

league_step_3.title: Generate fixture
league_step_3.field2Value: Use `fixture regenerate` if no scores exist, or `/league reset` to wipe everything.

league_step_4.title: View fixture
league_step_4.field2Value: Fixture cards render automatically as a PNG with navigation buttons.

league_step_5.title: Report score
league_step_5.description: `/league score league: slug` — opens the fixture card; pick a match and enter goals in the popup.
league_step_5.field3Value: Add `round:` when the same teams meet twice.

league_step_6.title: Standings
league_step_6.field2Value: Run `rollback standings` if the table looks wrong.

teams.title: Teams
teams.description: Always pass `league: slug`. Use exact names from `team list` when scoring.
teams.footer: short_name is limited to 4 characters on the table

matches.title: Scores
matches.description: Pick the command that matches the situation.
matches.footer: Same pairing twice? Set the round option.

admin.title: Admin
admin.description: Owner-level tools for rules, staff, and recovery.
admin.footer: `reset` clears matches and standings; settings covers permissions and points

tips.title: Tips
tips.field1Value: Fixture, standings, and score commands include visual cards by default.
tips.field2Value: Your `/language` setting overrides the server default.
tips.field3Value: Check team names, the round option, and that a fixture exists.
tips.footer: New league? Start with Step 1 in the menu.

hub.title: Golazo server control panel
hub.subtitle: {guild} · server control panel
hub.empty: No leagues yet. Create one below if you have **Manage Server**.

league.title: {name}
league.hintRegistration: Add teams, then open **Fixture** from the panel menu.
league.hintActive: Use **Score** for results or **Standings** for the table.

callout.hubHint: Pick a league from the menu or create a new one.
callout.emptyLeagues: No leagues yet — use **Create league** below.
callout.registration: Add teams in **Teams**, then generate the fixture.
callout.active: Use **Scores** for results or **Standings** for the table.
callout.scoreCanReport: Select a match below, then enter the score in the modal.
callout.scoreViewOnly: You can view scores; only reporters and admins can submit.
callout.resetConfirm: This will wipe all matches and standings. Teams are kept.

matchOps.hint: Select a match, then use the action buttons.
matchOps.noMatches: No matches available for status changes.

errors.guildOnly: Dashboard only works inside a server.
errors.manageGuild: You need **Manage Server** to create a league.
